name: XMAX V3 PRO Dosing Capsule 5pcs
summary: Designed for pre-loading, these capsules make it easy to prepare multiple sessions in advance.
description: Designed for pre-loading, these capsules make it easy to prepare multiple sessions in advance. Perfect for on-the-go use and high-frequency customers, this 5-piece set allows material to be prepared ahead of time. Quickly swap capsules in and out of the device for seamless session transitions without mess or downtime. Dosing capsules help minimise direct contact between material and the heating chamber, reducing residue buildup and keeping the device cleaner. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
